selection_reason: One shared temporal contract is required for the action-space comparison. Cursor-free training changed EE success by only +1/120 while reducing EE event-order validity and increasing early-close failures, and it reduced joint success from 53/120 to 18/120. Legacy therefore has materially better combined validation performance without selecting a different architecture per action space.

hypothesis_verdict.reason: Cursor-free retraining did not materially improve EE success or event ordering and increased early-close failures.

final_access_policy: Run the registered final split once for the selected raw legacy policies. Any shielded-policy run must be separately labeled diagnostic evidence and must not replace the raw result.
